## LibraryRuntime.IRuntimeRolledTruffle interface

Runtime confection narrowed to rolled truffle type.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IRuntimeRolledTruffle extends IRuntimeConfection 
```
**Extends:** [IRuntimeConfection](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.iruntimeconfection.md)
